code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Host as Host
    participant Client as Client
    participant Service as Service
    participant SubnetProvidersCache as SubnetProvidersCache
    participant BitswapStore as BitswapStore
    participant Content as Content (Education_StudentDB)
    participant Membership as Membership (Education_GradeSync)
    participant Discovery as Discovery (Education_GradeSync)
    participant Identify as Identify
    participant Remote as Remote

    %% Initialization
    Host->>+Service: new
    Service->>Identify: create
    Service->>Discovery: create
    Service->>Membership: create
    Service->>Content: create
    Service->>-Host: (Education_ContentCDN)

    Host->>+Service: run

    %% Bootstrapping
    Note over Host, Remote: Bootstrapping

    Membership->>Remote: subscribe to membership topic
    Service->>+Discovery: bootstrap from seed peers
    Discovery->>Remote: find neighbours
    Remote->>Discovery: peer addresses

    Discovery->>Discovery: add address
    Discovery->>+Service: peer routable
    Service->>-Membership: peer routable

    Host->>+Client: set provided subnets
    Client->>+Service: set provided subnets
    Service->>+Membership: set provided subnets
    Membership->>-Remote: publish subnets to membership topic

    Discovery->>-Service: bootstrap finished

    Remote->>Identify: listening address
    Identify->>+Service: listening address
    Service->>+Discovery: add address
    Discovery->>-Service: peer routable
    Service->>-Membership: peer routable

    %% Gossiping
    Note over Host, Remote: Gossiping

    loop Continuous Gossiping
        alt publish interval tick
            Membership->>Remote: publish SignedProviderRecord
            Membership->>SubnetProvidersCache: prune expired records
        else
            Remote->>+Membership: SignedProviderRecord
            alt if peer routable
                Membership->>-SubnetProvidersCache: add provider
            end
        end
    end

    %% Resolution
    Note over Host, Remote: Resolution

    Host->>+Client: resolve CID from subnet
    Client->>+Service: resolve CID from subnet
    Service->>Membership: get providers of subnet
    Service->>Service: prioritize peers, connected first

    loop Resolution Attempts
        Service->>+Content: resolve CID from first N peers
        Content->>BitswapStore: get missing blocks of root CID

        loop while has missing CID
            loop for each peer
                Content->>Remote: want-have CID
                Remote->>Content: have-block true/false
                Note left of Content: Gather peers who can be asked.
            end

            loop until have block or no more peers to try
                Content->>Remote: want-block CID
                alt block is received
                    Remote->>Content: block
                    Content->>BitswapStore: insert block
                    Content->>BitswapStore: get missing blocks of retrieved CID
                end
            end
        end

        Content->>-Service: resolution result
        alt if failed to resolve but has fallback peers
            Service->>Service: pick next N peers
        else
            Service->>-Client: resolution result
        end
    end
    Client->>-Host: resolution result

    alt if succeeded
        Host->>BitswapStore: retrieve content by CID
    end
repo_description: 🌳 Spawn multi-level trees of customized, scalable, EVM-compatible networks with IPC. L2++ powered by FVM, Wasm, libp2p, IPFS/IPLD, and CometBFT.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个教育内容分发网络的序列图，核心是Host启动后如何与各个服务协作。首先Host要创建Service，然后Service再初始化Identify、Discovery、Membership和Content这几个子模块。另外Content模块对应我们的Education_StudentDB，Membership和Discovery都关联到Education_GradeSync。
明白了，Service创建完子模块后，需要把Education_ContentCDN的信息回传给Host吗？还有Host调用Service的run方法是在什么时候？
对的，Service创建完Content后，要把Education_ContentCDN返回给Host。然后Host再调用Service的run方法启动整个服务。接下来进入Bootstrapping阶段，Membership需要订阅membership topic，同时Service让Discovery从种子节点开始引导。
好的，我已经把初始化流程和Bootstrapping的前半部分画出来了。看到Discovery从Remote获取peer addresses，然后自己add address，再通知Service peer routable。接下来Service要把这个状态同步给Membership，同时Host设置provided subnets给Client对吧？

没错，Client拿到provided subnets后要传给Service，Service再传给Membership，最后Membership向membership topic发布这些subnets。等Discovery完成bootstrap后，Remote还要把listening address给Identify，Identify再传给Service，Service更新到Discovery。这里有个循环确认peer routable的过程。
Gossiping阶段我理解了，Membership会定期发布SignedProviderRecord到Remote，同时清理SubnetProvidersCache里的过期记录。收到Remote传来的SignedProviderRecord时，如果peer routable就加入缓存。接下来Resolution阶段，Host通过Client向Service发起CID解析请求？

是的，Service先从Membership获取subnets的providers，优先选择已连接的peers。然后Content模块通过BitswapStore获取root CID缺失的blocks。这里有个复杂的过程：Content要向Remote发送want-have询问哪些peer有数据，收集完后再循环尝试want-block获取实际block，收到后插入BitswapStore并继续检查是否还有missing CID。
这里我需要调整一下，刚才画的BitswapStore位置不对，它应该是Content调用的，不是直接和Host交互。另外Resolution Attempts的循环里，如果解析失败但还有fallback peers，Service要重新选择下一批peers继续尝试，成功或耗尽peers后才返回结果给Client。最后Host从BitswapStore获取内容只有在解析成功时才发生。
修正得很好，BitswapStore确实是Content内部使用的。整个流程闭环了：解析成功时Host能从BitswapStore拿到内容，失败则返回错误。这个设计覆盖了教育内容从发现、同步到最终获取的完整生命周期。
